hero.tagline: Turning beauty brands into digital experiences that captivate, convert, and inspire.

about.bioParagraph1: I'm a marketing professional who lives at the intersection of beauty and digital strategy. With hands-on experience at global powerhouses like L'Oréal and Estée Lauder, I've learned that great marketing isn't just about selling products — it's about creating moments that make people feel something.
about.bioParagraph2: From hosting daily livestreams that exceeded 130% of KPIs, to co-founding a creative studio, to managing KOL campaigns with Vietnam's top influencers — I bring the rare blend of creative instinct and data-driven execution. Currently completing my Business Administration degree with a 3.68 GPA and a full merit scholarship.

educationHistory.institutionName: University of Economics and Finance, HCMC

projects.projectDescription: Led TikTok livestream sessions as Brand Ambassador, achieving 120–125% of monthly KPIs through strategic content alignment with seasonal campaigns and product launches.
Hosted daily OBS-powered livestream sessions showcasing the full Estée Lauder product line, consistently hitting 100–130% KPIs across 6 months of ecommerce campaigns.

projects.projectName: Baresoul Cosme — Brand Growth from Zero
projects.projectDescription: Built TikTok presence from scratch to 9K+ followers, managed KOL campaigns with top Vietnamese influencers (Giang Ơi, Hanna), and developed a B2B pool of 80–100 potential partners.

responsibilities: Supporting digital marketing campaigns and online brand activations for L'Oréal's Professional Products Division
Coordinating cross-functional teams to optimize social media presence and campaign performance
Hosted daily livestream sessions via OBS Studio, consistently achieving 100–130% of monthly KPIs
Aligned livestream content with seasonal campaigns, holiday promotions, and new product launches
Streamlined kitchen workflows and reorganized stations for peak efficiency
Collaborated with housekeeping to prioritize room schedules during high-occupancy periods
Hosted live product introductions, guided customers, and drove conversions through TikTok livestream
Co-created content strategy with Brand team, achieving highest KPI months: Nov (125%), Dec (120%)
Built TikTok presence from zero to 9K+ followers through strategic content planning
Managed influencer campaigns with prominent KOLs including Giang Ơi and Gia Đình Hanna
Developed B2B pipeline of 80–100 potential partners and managed major retail chains
Defined long-term strategy and brand positioning for a creative studio from the ground up
Designed communication plans that attracted 500+ student registrations across 3 core courses

skillList.skillDescription: Expert at hosting high-converting livestream sessions on TikTok, Shopee, and ecommerce platforms with consistent 100–130% KPI achievement.
Crafting brand narratives that connect — from luxury beauty to indie skincare, turning products into stories people remember.
Data-driven campaign strategy across social media, ecommerce, and influencer channels that deliver measurable results.
End-to-end influencer campaign management — from sourcing and negotiation to content alignment and performance tracking.
Building and nurturing business relationships, developing pipelines of 80–100 potential partners across retail and distribution.
Blending creative instinct with strategic thinking to design campaigns, marketing plans, and brand experiences that stand out.

activityAccomplishments: Led student engagement campaigns across Ho Chi Minh City for the regional conference
Contributed to growing event attendance to 1,000+ participants

accomplishments: Student of 5 Merits — Two consecutive years
Outstanding Contribution to UEF Extracurricular Activities (2021–2024)
